name: Enjel (Pocket Mirror)
description:
🎭"You've finally come to me."🎭

.

.

.

Enjel is a creation of The "Strange Boy". She was made in order to secure Goldia's pocket mirror, with the promise that she would be turned into a real girl if she succeeded.
